default.description: Least-privilege capabilities for Raff windows: core events/state only. All behavior goes through the app's own audited commands.

update-window.description: The update window's «حسنًا» button dismisses itself via the window API, and the window resizes between two fixed tiers (compact / expanded) so simple states don't carry the empty space the richest state needs — the only window that needs either from JS.
